current_wind.description: Moderate to strong headwind from NNW

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH: Headwind, use an overstable disc with a clean hyzer release to fight the wind.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH: Headwind, use an overstable disc for a reliable flight path.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH: Headwind, use an overstable disc to combat the wind.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH: Headwind, use an overstable disc for a controlled flight.

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH: Strong headwind, requires a very overstable disc and a controlled hyzer. Expect significant wind disruption.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH: Strong headwind, utilize a very overstable disc for maximum stability.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH: Strong headwind, a very overstable disc is essential for maintaining control.

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH: Left-to-right crosswind, manageable with a stable disc and a controlled hyzer to keep it from turning over.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH: Left-to-right crosswind, a stable to overstable disc can handle this wind effectively.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH: Left-to-right crosswind is difficult, as the fade and wind push in the same direction. An understable disc thrown with power might work, but LHFH is preferred.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH: Left-to-right crosswind, this is your preferred shot to fight the wind and maintain control.
